description:
A Telegram fork preserving the classic UI from before the Liquid Glass era.
Forkgram Classic is a fork of Telegram for Android with a single purpose: to preserve the classic interface — the era before "Liquid Glass".

It is based on Forkgram and inherits its quality-of-life tweaks, with no telemetry, no analytics and no third-party endpoints — all traffic goes only to Telegram's official servers.
